health.name: health
health.description: Health determines how much damage you can take before dying.

stamina.name: stamina
stamina.description: Stamina determines how many physical actions you can make.

mana.name: mana
mana.description: Mana determines how many spells you can cast.

attack.name: attack
attack.description: Attack determines the damages you cause when hitting an enemy.

defense.name: defence
defense.description: Defence decreases the damages you take when hit by an enemy.

strength.name: strength
strength.description: Strength determines your attack score when using a melee weapon.

endurance.name: endurance
endurance.description: Endurance determines your defence score when using a shield or wearing a heavy armour.

address.name: address
address.description: Address determines your attack score with a range weapon.

rapidity.name: rapidity
rapidity.description: Rapidity determines your defence score when wearing a light armour.

intelligence.name: intelligence
intelligence.description: Intelligence determines your attack score when using a magic power.

willpower.name: willpower
willpower.description: Willpower determines your mana score when wearing magic robes.

charisma.name: charisma
charisma.description: Charisma increases your skills in military recruitment and in trading and gives you bonuses in jewellery.

speed.name: speed
speed.description: Speed allows you to move faster.
